zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Ferrers於大約1438年出生時，她的父親William De Ferrers27歲，母親Elizabeth Belknap29歲。她和Sir Walter Devereux IV至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1469年1月9日享年32歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦素瓦可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Ferrers于大约1438年出生时，她的父亲William De Ferrers27岁，母亲Elizabeth Belknap29岁。她和Sir Walter Devereux IV至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1469年1月9日享年32岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦素瓦可。

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Ferrers was born about 1438, her father, William De Ferrers, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth Belknap, was 29. She had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Sir Walter Devereux IV. She died on 9 January 1469, at the age of 32, and was buried in Southwark, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Ferrers est née environ 1438, son père, William De Ferrers, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Belknap, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Sir Walter Devereux IV. Elle est décédée le 9 janvier 1469, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterrée à Southwark, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Ferrers um 1438 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William De Ferrers 27 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Belknap 29. Sie hatte mit Sir Walter Devereux IV mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Januar 1469 im Alter von 32 Jahren und wurde in Southwark, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Ferrers è nata il circa 1438, sua padre, William De Ferrers, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Belknap, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Sir Walter Devereux IV. Morì il 9 gennaio 1469, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolta a Southwark, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Ferrersが約1438年に生まれた時，父William De Ferrersは27歳，母Elizabeth Belknapは29歳であった。彼女はSir Walter Devereux IVとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1469年1月9日に32歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンソウスワークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Ferrers(이)가 대략 1438년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William De Ferrers(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Belknap(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Sir Walter Devereux IV(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1469년 1월 9일 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 소우스워크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Ferrers nasceu aproximadamente 1438, seu pai, William De Ferrers, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Belknap, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Sir Walter Devereux IV. Ela faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1469, com 32 anos, e foi sepultada em Southwark, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Ferrers родилась около 1438 г., её отцу по имени William De Ferrers было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Belknap, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Sir Walter Devereux IV. Она умерла 9 января 1469 г. в возрасте 32 лет и была похоронена в местности соутварк, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Ferrers nació aproximadamente 1438, su papá, William De Ferrers, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Belknap, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Sir Walter Devereux IV. Murió el 9 de enero de 1469, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultada en Southwark, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
